decision: At fixed hierarchy, support, and oracle-goal diagnostic, is the detached prior already sufficient to produce valid token fragments when used greedily or by prior-preserving tree search, or does every consequence-guided primitive search mode destroy reference recall and execution? If greedy or a tree method produces valid fragments or materially improves reference recall over prior-top-k CEM, keep training fixed and refine that interface; if all modes remain invalid, move to a dense learning-rate and objective screen for the primitive goal-value learner.

jobs.purpose: Matched evaluation-only comparison of prior greedy, shooting, top-k CEM, beam, A-star, and PUCT token selection using the validated prior-only GAR checkpoint. Primary gates are any valid sentence, solved trace, and planning reference recall; drift and invalid fragments are health diagnostics.
